characters.description: A House Winterscar relic knight, weaponsmith, and occult-fractal user who leads the house beside his sister Kidra. His armor is Journey, whose systems help him survive the costs of his unusual craft.
characters.name: Keith Winterscar

characters.description: Keith's sister, fellow leader of House Winterscar, and a trusted relic knight.
characters.name: Kidra

characters.description: A captive human soul connected to the Winterscars.
characters.name: Tenisent

characters.description: A powerful machine enemy pursuing Keith.
characters.name: To’Aacar

characters.description: The Deathless clan lord, a senior authority within the clan, and an ally of House Winterscar.
characters.name: Atius

characters.description: Keith's relic armor and occult support system.
characters.name: Journey

characters.description: A machine sovereign and adversary connected to Keith's hidden lead.
characters.name: Relinquished

characters.description: A collective of specialized machine intelligences linked to Keith's hidden lead. Their intentions and their relationship to the larger machine hierarchy remain uncertain, but they represent a distinct power whose priorities may not align with Relinquished.
characters.name: Mites

characters.description: A Shadowsong relic knight and Kidra’s ally.
characters.name: Anka Shadowsong

characters.description: A known clan ally and experienced instructor associated with House Winterscar.
characters.name: Ironreach

characters.description: A councillor who urges the clan not to assume the detained Chosen are guilty. She favors preserving sanctuary obligations and testing the evidence before punishment, providing a measured counterweight to demands for immediate retaliation.
characters.name: Dross

characters.description: The clan's senior Shadowsong military leader. After Atius's apparent death, the Prime takes temporary command, restores order, and directs preparations for the approaching security crisis while the council chooses an acting clan lord.
characters.name: Shadowsong Prime

characters.description: Keith’s captain and a House Winterscar knight who escorts the recovered soul-cutting blade to the council.
characters.name: Sagrius

characters.description: The disarmed leader of the detained Chosen. He argues for coexistence with machines and proposes that Winterscar colonists help establish an underground settlement.
characters.name: Chosen priest

characters.description: The unnamed commander of twenty-three Chosen relic knights who remain outside the colony. Keith considers the captain one of the leading suspects in the raid while the force is unaccounted for.
characters.name: Chosen knights' captain

characters.description: A newly remade Feather commanding Relinquished's siege of Undecider City. She holds Tenisent's soul, directs human collaborators, and is compelled to obey through a unity fractal that can destroy her.
characters.name: To’Wrathh

characters.description: The renowned commander placed in charge of Undecider City's defense. He directs its resistance to To’Wrathh's siege behind the machine-blocking pillar.
characters.name: Zaang

characters.description: A stored crusader combat simulation within Journey. It can take direct control of the armor for training and teach House Winterscar's knights from the experience of a former wearer, while remaining distinct from any living person in the present.
characters.name: Journey's former crusader engram

characters.description: The human identity To’Wrathh adopts while moving among Undecider City's Puritans. As Sophia, she argues that machines can honor a surrender while quietly learning how civilians respond to the siege and how news of the proposed terms is spreading.
characters.name: Sophia

characters.description: A winged stranger who presents herself as a new-generation Deathless after catching Keith and healing his mortal wounds. She says she remembers life as a soldier, needs power to sustain her unusual armor, and seeks guidance from a Mite speaker.
characters.name: Hecate

characters.description: Keith's name for the drake sent to stalk him and Hecate. The machine serves To’Aacar, keeps its distance while hunting them, and refuses Hecate's appeal to abandon its mission, creating a persistent threat while their armor power dwindles.
characters.name: Fido

characters.description: The Feather previously traveling as Hecate is revealed as To’Wrathh, the former hunter of the Winterscars. She refuses To’Aacar's command to kill Keith, calls for help from Undecider City, and openly joins the fight against him.
characters.name: To’Wrathh
